Our Story

Ten Years of Coming Together.

The George Barnes Family Reunion began ten years ago with a simple but powerful vision. Mike Hicks, seeing how life and distance had scattered family members across the country, decided something had to be done. He wanted to bring everyone back together — not just for a day, but to build a tradition that would carry the family forward for generations.

What started as a gathering has grown into something much bigger. The reunion has become the place where cousins meet for the first time, where elders share stories that would otherwise be lost, and where the youngest members of the family learn who they are and where they come from.

In 2026, we celebrate our 10th reunion. This milestone belongs to every family member who has shown up, contributed, and kept the spirit alive — and to Mike, whose vision made it all possible.
